name: guided-overview-only
_note: Runs a MINIMAL preflight (adherence-intro-agent: no analysis, no diff read, emits {cluster,examined} then noop) followed by the guided overview (overview-agent -> conclude-overview), then done. The preflight exists SOLELY to make the protocol multi-phase (>1 agent/fanout phase) so the engine writes per-node state under <protocol>/pr-N/<phase>.yaml (+ .evidence.json) like code-review, instead of the single-phase flat <protocol>/pr-N.yaml. No engine or API change. Triggered by /overview to avoid colliding with code-review's /review trigger. Each agent re-fetches its own PR data; no inputs reference earlier phases.
